text:
This declaration is made within [free-standing proceedings for a declaration of parentage] / [other proceedings].

IT IS DECLARED THAT:

Person A [is] / [was] the parent of Person B.

(provisions for re-registration by the registrar general in this order do not apply to children born outside the jurisdiction and must be deleted)

A court officer shall send a copy of this order and a copy of the application leading to this order to the Registrar General for Births and Deaths within 21 days of the declaration being made so that he may consider the re-registration of the birth of Person B under Births and Deaths Registration Act 1953, section 14A.

Costs

The costs of this application are [specify].

Dated [date]

Order
The Family Law Act 1986, section 55A

metadata.source: Standard Family Orders — Volume 2: Children and Other Orders (May 2026)
